summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Scheduled maintenance day Tuesday 14 July 2026: expect disruption to all CEDA & JASMIN services. Please plan your work accordingly.

summary: Longer wait times due to staff shortage

updates.details: Wait times for SSH access are currently longer than usual. We apologise for any inconvenience.
Capacity to process requests will be further reduced during 15-19th June.

summary: Slurm jobs failing or stuck in CG state

updates.details: Some Slurm jobs on LOTUS are failing or becoming stuck, we are currently investigating this issue. Apologies for any inconvenience.
Various hosts having issues with GPUs, including GPUs not initialising. Cluster has been drained and investigation is ongoing.

summary: Tape library having issues, recalls with be delayed

updates.details: Tape service is having issues mounting tapes, so recalls will be delayed.
Tape recalls will be down tomorrow, Tue 2nd June.
A power issue affecting the JASMIN machine room has affected many services overnight. Team investigating.
Team currently awaiting confirmation of power stability before further systems can be restarted safely. An earlier attempt was disrupted by a further brief power outage.
Power fault now rectified, systems now being gradually brought back online but may encounter hardware faults. Please await further updates before reconnecting.

LOTUS jobs can be submitted but will not run until all storage is fully online. SOF (/gws/nopw) storage up, PFS (/gws/pw, scratch & XFC still rebuilding, may be some hours), a few web-based services now working dependent on reliance on storage, k8s based services incl notebooks to follow. Home directories and SSD/SSDE storage OK, Object store still unavailable. Data transfer OK depending on storage used.

Object storage still unavailable until earliest tomorrow (19/06). PFS storage still reconstructing: available but slow, except scratch-pw4 still unavailable. K8s (web services and notebooks) offline until object storage and PFS fully available. LOTUS still accepting jobs but not running them. Other services resumed, but could be affected by storage dependencies.
Status as per last update, team continues to work on restoring services, further update due around lunchtime.

Object storage is working but slow, PFS storage (esp. scratch-pw4) still reconstructing. Notebook service still down and LOTUS jobs not yet running: both due to dependency on scratch-pw4, but most other services now back up.

Tape recalls will be down tomorrow, Tue 2nd June.
A power issue affecting the JASMIN machine room has affected many services overnight. Team investigating.
Team currently awaiting confirmation of power stability before further systems can be restarted safely. An earlier attempt was disrupted by a further brief power outage.
Power fault now rectified, systems now being gradually brought back online but may encounter hardware faults. Please await further updates before reconnecting.

K8s (web services and notebooks) offline until object storage and PFS fully available. LOTUS still accepting jobs but not running them. Other services resumed, but could be affected by storage dependencies.

LOTUS & Jupyter Notebooks service still unavailable due to scratch disk /work/scratch-pw4 reconstructing. A plan is currently being prepared to replace this volume with a new empty volume, in order to re-enable these services more quickly. Details to follow.
